title: WitchHazel: Halloween Magic
description: A magic modpack filled with every school of wizardry, with a fall autumn halloween aesthetic.
body: WitchHazel is a 1.20.1 Forge modpack filled to the brim with magic mods! From the classics, like Botania and Ars Nouveau, to ones you may not have heard of, like Theurgy and Hexerai. Whatever your preferred school of magic, it's in this pack. In addition, the pack is aesthetically autumn-themed, with plenty of decor mods to allow you to decorate your mage's lair as you please. Magic mods included: - Alchemist's Garden - Ars Nouveau (+ addons) - Blood Magic - Botania (+ MythicBotany) - Eidolon: Repraised - Embers Rekindled - Enigmatic Legacy - Forbidden and Arcanus - Goety - Hexerai - Mahou Tsukai - Malum - Nature's Aura - Occultism - Tarot Cards - Theurgy **Please note** that Lootr, Open Parties and Claims, and Simple Voice Chat are off by default due to being obnoxious in single player. If you're playing multiplayer, please turn content management on and turn these mods on.  Like what I make? Want to support my modpack making endeavours? (and maybe eventually proper modding?)  Alternatively, if you and your friends need a server, you can get 15% off your first month from Kinetic Hosting and help support me if you use my code! https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=852  ![Banner image that promotes Kinetic Hosting, and a partnership deal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/012e88aa58e334890e64fcbdf3aa1bb4b11446e1_0.webp)
